Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: This is a straightforward SQL task that requires me to Count events per case_id Filter to keep only cases with 6 or fewer events Return all events from those filtered cases

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Option 1 CTE approach WITH case_counts AS SELECT case_id COUNT as event_count FROM event_log GROUP BY case_id HAVING COUNT <= 6 SELECT el FROM event_log el INNER JOIN case_counts cc ON el case_id equals cc case_id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Option 2 Window function approach SELECT FROM SELECT COUNT OVER PARTITION BY case_id as event_count FROM event_log WHERE event_count <= 6
